default_route_action.description: Defines the default routing action for requests that do not match any configured path matcher in the URL map; must specify either a redirect or forwarding configuration.
default_route_action.type: list(object({cors_policy: list(object({allow_credentials: optional(bool),allow_headers: optional(list(string)),allow_methods: optional(list(string)),allow_origin_regexes: optional(list(string)),allow_origins: optional(list(string)),disabled: optional(bool),expose_headers: optional(list(string)),max_age: optional(number)})),fault_injection_policy: list(object({abort: list(object({http_status: optional(number),percentage: optional(number)})),delay: list(object({percentage: optional(number),fixed_delay: list(object({nanos: optional(number),seconds: optional(string)}))}))})),request_mirror_policy: list(object({backend_service: optional(string)})),retry_policy: list(object({num_retries: optional(number),retry_conditions: optional(list(string)),per_try_timeout: list(object({nanos: optional(number),seconds: optional(string)}))})),timeout: list(object({nanos: optional(number),seconds: optional(string)})),url_rewrite: list(object({host_rewrite: optional(string),path_prefix_rewrite: optional(string)})),weighted_backend_services: list(object({backend_service: optional(string),weight: optional(number),header_action: list(object({request_headers_to_remove: optional(list(string)),response_headers_to_remove: optional(list(string)),request_headers_to_add: list(object({header_name: optional(string),header_value: optional(string),replace: optional(bool)})),response_headers_to_add: list(object({header_name: optional(string),header_value: optional(string),replace: optional(bool)}))}))}))}))

default_service.description: Specifies the backend service to route traffic to when no other rule matches. Must be a valid regional backend service resource.

default_url_redirect.description: Defines the default URL redirect configuration, specifying how requests should be redirected when no other rules match.
default_url_redirect.type: list(object({host_redirect: optional(string),https_redirect: optional(bool),path_redirect: optional(string),prefix_redirect: optional(string),redirect_response_code: optional(string),strip_query: bool}))

description.description: Defines the user-provided description for the regional URL map, which can be used to identify its purpose or functionality.

host_rule.description: Defines rules to match specific hostnames for routing traffic, requiring at least one hostname and a path matcher.

name.description: Unique name for the regional URL map, required to be compliant with GCP naming conventions (1-63 characters, lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens).

path_matcher.description: Defines the configuration for matching HTTP request paths, including rules and routing behavior for regional URL maps.

test.description: Defines the name of the test URL map to be created in a specific region, used for routing traffic based on request properties.

timeouts.description: Defines the amount of time to wait for the resource operations to complete.
